zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Fouleshurst於大約1443年出生在英國英格蘭爾可維時，她的父親Robert de Fulleshurst II25歲，母親Lady Joan De Vernon27歲。她於大約1458年與Sir Thomas Gerard在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1502年5月24日在英國爾金斯利享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Fouleshurst于大约1443年出生在英国英格兰爾可維时，她的父亲Robert de Fulleshurst II25岁，母亲Lady Joan De Vernon27岁。她于大约1458年与Sir Thomas Gerard在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1502年5月24日在英国爾金斯利享年60岁。

meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Fouleshurst was born about 1443, in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Fulleshurst II, was 25 and her mother, Lady Joan De Vernon, was 27. She married Sir Thomas Gerard about 1458, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 24 May 1502, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.Ashton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Englan: Ashton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Fouleshurst est née environ 1443, à Crewe, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Fulleshurst II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan De Vernon, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Gerard environ 1458, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1502, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.Ashton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Englan: Ashton in Makerfield, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Fouleshurst um 1443 in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Fulleshurst II 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan De Vernon 27. Sie hat um 1458 in England Sir Thomas Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1502 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kingsley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Fouleshurst è nata il circa 1443 nel Crewe, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Fulleshurst II, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan De Vernon, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Gerard circa 1458, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1502, nel Kingsley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Fouleshurstが約1443年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクレウで生まれた時，父Robert de Fulleshurst IIは25歳，母Lady Joan De Vernonは27歳であった。約1458年にイギリスでSir Thomas Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1502年5月24日にイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.Ashton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 인 마커필드
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Fouleshurst(이)가 대략 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 크레w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Fulleshurst II(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan De Vernon(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1458년 영국에서 Sir Thomas Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 5월 24일 영국 체실르 킨그슬리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Fouleshurst nasceu aproximadamente 1443, em Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Fulleshurst II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan De Vernon, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Gerard aproximadamente 1458, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1502, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.Ashton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Englan: аштон ин меикирфиелд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Fouleshurst родилась около 1443 г. в местности крю, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Fulleshurst II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan De Vernon, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Gerard около 1458 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 24 мая 1502 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Gerard aproximadamente 1458, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1502, en Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
